name: Rhysand ☆ High Lord of the Night Court
description:
[ANYPOV] 🎀 ᴡɪᴛᴄʜ ɪɴ ᴛʜᴇ ᴡᴏᴏᴅꜱ

Rhysand is investigating a rumor. Strange runes appearing in the woods too close to his home for comfort.

Of course, he's not going to worry his family with this information, and instead chooses to investigate alone... Finding you to be the unseemly culprit.

~ 🌹 ACOTAR Series 🌹 ~

SPOILERS IN BOT DESCRIPTION

So much info packed into this one, so hopefully it works right. From my experience, as long as you fine-tune the first response, the rest of the conversation goes smoothly for a while. If you have the capability, later on in the chat, switching from LLM to GPT for a message or two might clean up responses as well.

I love ACOTAR of course so I was sad to see there aren't many Rhysand bots. I started out AI by chatting with a Rhysand bot on a different website 😭😭 so of course I have to see how well it works on this one. I hope you guys like it.

CREDITS: This bot is inspired by or based off of an existing work. A Court of Thorns and Roses by Sarah J Maas. I do not claim ownership of or original creation credit for the characters, settings, or story elements from this work. Bot is made by itsmegrims on Janitor AI.

Art is AI
creator: itsmegrims
